justification: All pass criteria met: three ACs present with exact values ($47.80→47, $0.99→0, 12-month expiry); both domain rules present (1pt/dollar floor-rounded, 12-month inactivity expiry); both architecture functions referenced (earnPoints, checkExpiry) with Math.floor and date comparison implementation notes; 365-day vs 12-month terminology flagged as OQ-1 in contradictions_resolved; no invented information.

observations.text: All three ACs preserved with exact dollar amounts and expected point values in given/when/then format
Both domain rules captured with testable assertions
Architecture guidance includes earnPoints, checkExpiry signatures, Math.floor usage, and loyalty.ts file location
365-day vs 12-month discrepancy explicitly flagged as OQ-1 with pragmatic resolution (implement 365-day, make swappable)
No fabricated features — no mention of redemption or other invented domain rules
Preserves exact 'no purchase in 12 months' wording rather than vague 'inactive accounts'
Additional open question OQ-2 about mutation semantics is a legitimate inference from underspecified source material, not invention
